events.name: The Primordial One's Gift
events.description: A being older than time itself reaches across the veil to reward those who have proven their mettle in battle. Defeat nine bosses during the event window and receive a fragment of primordial power.
events.reward_message: The Primordial One acknowledges your strength. A crystallized shard of cosmic power materialises in your hands!

events.name: The Grand Feast
events.description: The gods themselves celebrate the season with a grand banquet and have sent their finest delicacies down to worthy adventurers. A gift for all who brave the realm during this festive period.
events.reward_message: A divine parcel materialises before you — a lavish Grand Feast Platter sent by the gods themselves. Enjoy the bounty!

events.name: Spring Blessing
events.description: Adventurers who answer the call on the sacred day of the Spring Blessing receive a fortune in gold from the realm's treasury.
events.reward_message: Today is the sacred Spring Blessing! The realm's treasury showers you with 1,000,000 gold coins — welcome, blessed adventurer!
